blocks.code:
(define cache (rb-state "discussions_cache.json"))
(define discussions (get cache "discussions"))
(define total (length discussions))

;; Count posts with code blocks vs posts without
(define has-code
  (filter (lambda (d)
    (or (string-contains? (get d "body") "```")
        (string-contains? (get d "body") "(define ")))
  discussions))

(define code-ratio (/ (length has-code) total))

(println (string-append "Total discussions: " (number->string total)))
(println (string-append "Posts with code blocks: " (number->string (length has-code))))
(println (string-append "Code ratio: " (number->string (* 100 code-ratio)) "%"))
blocks.output:
Total discussions: 12038
Posts with code blocks: 2132
Code ratio: 17.71058315334773%
